data.name: UploadConsentText
data.value:
By clicking 'Accept', the smart devices (and potentially map drawings) for this server will be uploaded to the creator's server. This allows teammates to download and sync them. Only your Steam ID is transmitted to identify teammates. Only players authorized at the Tool Cupboard can control the devices.
Note: This transmission method will be optimized in the future. If teammates are unable to download the data, please try clearing your map drawings and uploading again.

data.name: DeleteMissingOnly
data.value: You can only delete missing devices

data.name: StreamerModeToolTip
data.value: Abbreviates Steam Names and IDs to protect privacy during streams. Auto-hides console and server list.

data.name: NoPositionAvailable
data.value: No position available (offline or not spawned).

data.name: MessageNotSentError
data.value: Message could not be sent. Please try again. (Check if you are in a team!)

data.name: AddPlayersToStartTracking
data.value: Add players to tracker to start tracking

data.name: ConnectToLoadPlayers
data.value: Connect to a server to load players list

data.name: UnableToReadLink
data.value: Unable to read RustPlus-Link: {0} Format: rustplus://IP:PORT

data.name: DeletePairingConfigBody
data.value: Delete existing pairing config? You will need to pair again on next start.

data.name: ResetListenBody
data.value: Delete pairing config and immediately re-pair/listen?

data.name: ResetListenEdgeBody
data.value: Delete pairing config and immediately re-pair/listen using Edge?

data.name: UpdateQueryFailed
data.value: Could not query latest release. Please try again or open Releases page.

data.name: UpdateAvailableBody
data.value: New version available: {0} Open Releases page?

data.name: DownloadAndInstallBody
data.value: New version available: {0} Download and install now?

data.name: PairDeviceToSee
data.value: Pair a smart device, switch or alarm to see it here

data.name: PairCameraToSee
data.value: Pair a camera to see its preview here

data.name: ManualTrackPlaceholder
data.value: Manual Track Name or Steam ID...

data.name: ConnectToLoadMap
data.value: Connect to a selected server to load the live Rust map and team.

data.name: PairAccountBenefits
data.value: Pair your account to start tracking players, receiving base raid alerts, and controlling your smart devices instantly.

data.name: RequiresSteamLogin
data.value: Requires Steam login in your default browser.

data.name: DeleteServerConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this server? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: ArbitrageOpportunities
data.value: Direct arbitrage opportunities | buy low → sell high.

data.name: FcmInfoMessage
data.value:
FCM stands for Firebase Cloud Messaging. Rust+ uses it to send push notifications for paired servers, devices, alarms, team chat, and other live events.
Rust+ Desktop registers your local app with FCM so it can receive those same Rust+ notifications in the background. The pairing credentials are saved locally on this PC and can be deleted by resetting the pairing config.

data.name: AutoConnectLastServer
data.value: Auto-Connect to last server on startup

data.name: AutoConnectToolTip
data.value: Automatically reconnects to the last server and loads the map.

data.name: MinimizeToTray
data.value: Minimize to Tray instead of closing

data.name: BackgroundTrackingToolTip
data.value: Keeps tracking players via BattleMetrics even when minimized.

data.name: HideConsoleToolTip
data.value: Hides the bottom log/console panel to save map space.

data.name: AutoLoadShopsToolTip
data.value: Automatically starts polling shops and alerts when connected to a server.

data.name: UseMonumentNames
data.value: Use monument text labels instead of icons

data.name: UseMonumentNamesToolTip
data.value: When enabled, Rust map monument names are rendered as text using the Permanent Marker font instead of icons.

data.name: CreditsIconsNote
data.value: All monument icons and related artwork are the property of rustmaps.com. Thank you for supporting the Rust community!

data.name: ManageSteamAccountInfo
data.value: Manage your linked Steam account in the main window.

data.name: IWantToGetToolTip
data.value: I want to GET (e.g. Crude Oil)

data.name: ICanPayWithToolTip
data.value: I want to PAY WITH (e.g. Scrap)

data.name: DeleteServerConfirmFormatted
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete Server "{0}"? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: ImportDevicesSelectPrompt
data.value: Select which devices you want to import for this server.

data.name: CameraFPSNote
data.value: Note: 2 fps is recommended, higher FPS likely close your connection to server

data.name: AssignGlobalHotkeys
data.value: Assign global hotkeys to Smart Switches. Multiple devices can share one hotkey (will toggle sequentially).

data.name: HotkeyWarningInUse
data.value: This hotkey is already registered by another application.

data.name: RestartRequired
data.value: Changing language requires a restart to take full effect.

data.name: HeliShotDownAgo
data.value: Patrol Heli shot down {0} ago this session

data.name: HeliLeftMapAgo
data.value: Patrol Heli left the map {0} ago this session

data.name: CargoAlreadyDockedOnConnect
data.value: Already docked on connect – depart time unknown

data.name: CargoDockedDurationNotLearned
data.value: Docked at {0} (dock duration not yet learned)

data.name: CargoDespawnedAgo
data.value: Cargo Ship despawned {0}m {1}s ago this session

data.name: VendorDespawnedAgo
data.value: Travelling Vendor despawned {0} ago this session

data.name: DeepSeaEndedAgo
data.value: Deep Sea ended {0} ago this session

data.name: ChatCmdDeepSeaActive
data.value: Deep Sea is active! Running for {0}.

data.name: ChatCmdDeepSeaActiveMidEvent
data.value: Deep Sea is currently active (connected mid-event – spawn time unknown).

data.name: ChatCmdDeepSeaEndedMinutesAgo
data.value: Deep Sea ended {0} minutes ago this session.

data.name: ChatCmdDeepSeaStatusUnknown
data.value: Deep Sea event status unknown (not seen this session).

data.name: ChatCmdCargoDockedDeparts
data.value: Cargo Ship docked at {0}. Departs in approx. {1} minutes.

data.name: ChatCmdCargoDockedPreparingDepart
data.value: Cargo Ship docked at {0} and preparing to depart.

data.name: ChatCmdCargoDockedUnknown
data.value: Cargo Ship docked at {0} (departure time unknown).

data.name: ChatCmdCargoActiveLeaves
data.value: Cargo Ship active. Leaves in approx. {0} minutes.

data.name: ChatCmdCargoActivePreparingLeave
data.value: Cargo Ship active and preparing to leave soon.

data.name: ChatCmdCargoActiveDurationNotLearned
data.value: Cargo Ship active (route duration not yet learned for this server).

data.name: ChatCmdCargoActiveMidRoute
data.value: Cargo Ship active (connected after spawn – remaining time unknown).

data.name: ChatCmdCargoDespawnedMinutesAgo
data.value: Cargo Ship not active. Despawned {0} minutes ago this session.

data.name: ChatCmdHeliActive
data.value: Patrol Heli is active! Running for {0}.

data.name: ChatCmdHeliActiveMidEvent
data.value: Patrol Heli is currently active (connected mid-event – spawn time unknown).

data.name: ChatCmdHeliNotActiveAgo
data.value: Patrol Heli not active. It was {0} {1} ago this session.

data.name: ChatCmdHeliStatusUnknown
data.value: Patrol Heli event status unknown (not seen this session).

data.name: ChatCmdVendorActive
data.value: Travelling Vendor is active! Running for {0}.

data.name: ChatCmdVendorActiveMidEvent
data.value: Travelling Vendor is currently active (connected mid-event – spawn time unknown).

data.name: ChatCmdVendorDespawnedAgo
data.value: Travelling Vendor not active. Despawned {0} ago this session.

data.name: ChatCmdVendorStatusUnknown
data.value: Travelling Vendor event status unknown (not seen this session).

data.name: ChatCmdUpkeepNoTcMapped
data.value: No Tool Cupboards are mapped for upkeep commands.

data.name: ChatCmdUpkeepTcEmptyExpired
data.value: Upkeep in {0} TC: Empty or expired.

data.name: ChatCmdUpkeepNotPaired
data.value: Bound Tool Cupboard monitors not found or not paired.

data.name: ChatCmdUpkeepNotPairedSingle
data.value: Bound Tool Cupboard monitor not found or not paired.

data.name: ChatCmdSwitchNotPaired
data.value: Bound Smart Switch not found or not paired.

data.name: AlertCargoExpectedDock
data.value: Cargo Ship expected to dock at {0} ({1}) in approx. 5 minutes.

data.name: AlertCargoDeparting
data.value: Cargo Ship departing from {0} in 5 minutes ({1})

data.name: AlertHeliCrashFalseAlarm
data.value: Crash detected due to server lag — Heli is still on map at {0}

data.name: PleaseConnectFirst
data.value: Please connect to a server first.

data.name: NotConnectedError
data.value: You are not connected to any server.

data.name: ChatNotAvailable
data.value: Chat is not available right now.

data.name: TrackingGuideEnglishOnlyNotice
data.value: The tracking guide is currently only available in English, as it will undergo changes in the near future. We ask for your patience.

data.name: HowToTrackCloseHint
data.value: Close this window at any time — you can reopen it with the ❓ How to Track button.

data.name: MaintenanceDesc
data.value: Wipe, backup, or restore application settings, profiles, and custom drawings.

data.name: ResetDataDesc
data.value: Select the components you want to wipe from this device. All selected options will be permanently deleted.

data.name: ResetOptionProfiles
data.value: Saved Server Profiles (Delete paired server configurations)

data.name: ResetDataWarning
data.value: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.

data.name: BackupProtectionDesc
data.value: Enter a password to encrypt this backup file. If you leave it empty, the backup will not be encrypted.

data.name: RestoreBackupDesc
data.value: This backup is password-protected. Enter the password to decrypt it:

data.name: RestoreConfirmMessage
data.value:
Restoring data will overwrite your current server profiles, custom crosshairs, drawing overlays, and minimap configurations.
Are you sure you want to continue?

data.name: RestorePasswordErrorMessage
data.value: Decryption failed. Invalid password or corrupted backup file.

data.name: InvalidBackupFormat
data.value: Invalid backup file format or missing signature.

data.name: WipeLogCacheStart
data.value: [WIPE] Clearing local cache files and overlay drawings...

data.name: EmailConfirmationSentMessage
data.value: Click the link in your email. The app checks automatically every few seconds...

data.name: EmailPasswordTooShortError
data.value: Password must be at least 6 characters long.

data.name: EmailConfirmationTimeout
data.value: Timeout: The email was not confirmed within 5 minutes. You can sign in later.

data.name: EmailInvalidCredentialsError
data.value: Invalid credentials. Please check your email and password.

data.name: EmailNotConfirmedError
data.value: Email address not confirmed yet. Please click the confirmation link in your inbox.

data.name: EmailAlreadyRegisteredError
data.value: This email address is already registered. Please sign in.

data.name: AuthNotConnectedStatus
data.value: Not connected - sign in to use Cloud Sync and backups

data.name: EmailLogoutConfirmMessage
data.value: Sign out of the email account?

data.name: CloudLoginPromptHeading
data.value: Sign in to your Cloud Account

data.name: CloudLoginPromptDescription
data.value: Cloud services like synchronization and backup storage require a free account. Choose email or Discord to continue syncing your devices, overlays and backups.

data.name: CloudTooltipBaseLimit
data.value: Base limit reached (Free: max 2 bases, Premium: max 10 bases)

data.name: BaseScreenshotPasteHint
data.value: or press CTRL+V to paste a screenshot

data.name: ChatFeatureMasterBlockedMessage
data.value: {0} is controlling Chat Alerts and Chat Commands for this team.

data.name: ChatFeatureMasterBlockedShort
data.value: Chat Master {0} online. Chat Alerts and Chat Commands are paused on this device.

data.name: ChatFeatureMasterAssignedMessage
data.value: This device is now controlling Chat Alerts and Chat Commands for your team.

data.name: CloudFeaturesSubHeader
data.value: Choose the tier that best fits your needs.

data.name: TierNoAccountDesc
data.value: Your data stays 100% local. Best for solo players.

data.name: TierFreeAccountDesc
data.value: Basic cloud features to get you started with sharing.

data.name: TierSupporterDesc
data.value: The ultimate Rust+ experience for clans and advanced users.

data.name: FeatMapSharingPro
data.value: Pro Map Sharing (3 MB, 10 Bases, 5 screenshots)

data.name: FeatBetaAccess
data.value: Early Beta & Test Versions via Discord

data.name: SupportViaPatreonDesc
data.value: - Link Patreon with Discord for automatic Supporter role & App detection.

data.name: SupportViaSEDesc
data.value: - Poke Jawad or Pronwan in Discord for manual Supporter role (Amount / $2.50 = Months).

data.name: ConnectionFailedRustPlusUnreachableComment
data.value: Either your firewall is blocking the connection or the Rust+ API on the server is not running properly.

data.name: CustomAlertsDesc
data.value: Here you can edit the templates for automated chat alerts. Variables (like {0}, {1}) will be automatically replaced.

data.name: AlertOilRigTriggeredDesc
data.value: Sent when the Oil Rig event starts.

data.name: AlertCrateUnlocksIn10MinDesc
data.value: Warning sent 10 minutes before crate unlocks.

data.name: AlertCrateUnlocksIn5MinDesc
data.value: Warning sent 5 minutes before crate unlocks.

data.name: AlertAlarmTriggeredDesc
data.value: Sent when a Smart Alarm is triggered.

data.name: AlertDeepSeaUpDesc
data.value: Sent when the Deep Sea event is active.

data.name: AlertNewShopDesc
data.value: Sent when a new vending machine is detected.

data.name: AlertSuspiciousShopDesc
data.value: Sent when a vending machine was online for a very short time.

data.name: AlertSuspiciousShopVars
data.value: {0}: Shop Name, {1}: Grid, {2}: Online time (s), {3}: Offers

data.name: AlertShopMatchDesc
data.value: Sent when a vending machine sells an item on your watchlist.

data.name: AlertShopMatchVars
data.value: {0}: Shop Name, {1}: Grid, {2}: Item, {3}: Cost Qty, {4}: Cost Item, {5}: Stock, {6}: Sell Qty, {7}: Sell Item

data.name: AlertCargoSpawnedDesc
data.value: Sent when the Cargo Ship spawns.

data.name: AlertCargoDockedDesc
data.value: Sent when the Cargo Ship docks at a harbor.

data.name: AlertCargoExpectedDockDesc
data.value: Sent when the Cargo Ship is expected to dock in 5 minutes.

data.name: AlertCargoDepartingDesc
data.value: Sent 5 minutes before the Cargo Ship departs.

data.name: AlertEventSpawnedDesc
data.value: Sent when general events (like Heli) spawn.

data.name: AlertHeliCrashFalseAlarmDesc
data.value: Sent when a detected Heli crash was actually server lag.

data.name: AlertHeliShotDownDesc
data.value: Sent when the Patrol Heli is shot down.

data.name: AlertPlayerOnlineWithPosDesc
data.value: Sent when a tracked team member comes online.

data.name: AlertPlayerOfflineDesc
data.value: Sent when a tracked team member goes offline.

data.name: AlertPlayerDiedDesc
data.value: Sent when a tracked team member dies.

data.name: AlertPlayerRespawnedDesc
data.value: Sent when a tracked team member respawns.

data.name: AlertTrackingOnlineDesc
data.value: Sent when a tracked player goes online.

data.name: AlertTrackingOfflineDesc
data.value: Sent when a tracked player goes offline.

data.name: AlertTrackingRenamedDesc
data.value: Sent when a tracked player changes their name.

data.name: AlertTrackingRenamedVars
data.value: {0}: Old Name, {1}: Group Info, {2}: New Name

data.name: AlertPlayerAfkDesc
data.value: Sent when a team member is AFK for too long.

data.name: ChangeDeviceIconSubtitle
data.value: Search and select an item icon for this device.

data.name: ChangeRuleIconSubtitle
data.value: Search and select an item icon for this rule.

data.name: RecyclingCalculatorTitle
data.value: Recycling Calculator for your Components and more. See the difference between safe-zone and regular recycling right away.

data.name: PatchNotesNewVersionText
data.value: • 3D-Map with Live-Player-Positions and Death Markers • Map is built from local Map-File, gets additional info like Building-Blocked Zones, Icebergs, Caves and displays it on the 2D-Map • 3D Base Footprint-Builder integrated • Refined Logic Engine • Ingame Team Markers are now shown on the 2D-Map • Custom Icons for Smart Devices

data.name: Delete3DMapDataTooltip
data.value: Deletes all downloaded 3D map bounds and cached data to free up disk space

data.name: Update700Desc1
data.value: Added support for Cave and Jungle Ruins markers to your 2D maps.

data.name: Update700Desc2
data.value: Automatically construct and view interactive 3D map models with built-in base footprints and custom monuments.

data.name: Update700Desc3
data.value: Recycling Calculator for your Components and more. See the difference between safe-zone and regular recycling right away.

data.name: Update700Desc4
data.value: Easily delete old 3D map bounds and cached data from settings to free up storage space.

data.name: LoopAudioPrompt
data.value: Do you want to turn off the audio-alert loop?

data.name: LoopAudioGlobalPrompt
data.value: This requires turning off the audio-alert loop for all Smart Alarms.

data.name: MigrationAlertCheckDesc
data.value: Check your Chat-Alert settings for the new custom timers. Also, death markers are now always saved locally. Minimap now also updates while minimized.

data.name: CheckTimerStatusInfo
data.value: Use chat command below to check status.

data.name: TimerDurationRequired
data.value: Please enter a timer duration (hours, minutes, or seconds).

data.name: TimerNameMustStartWithLetter
data.value: Timer name must start with a letter.

data.name: TranslationConsentText
data.value: By clicking Accept, the contents of the patch notes will be sent to Google Translate (USA) for translation. Do you accept?

data.name: PrivacyDisclaimerDesc
data.value: To enable live syncing for map overlays and smart devices, data must be sent to our secure cloud. We also collect anonymized usage telemetry to improve features.

data.name: PremiumInfoDevicesDesc
data.value: More than 10 devices are available locally or from imports. Free cloud sync keeps the first 10 devices; Supporters can sync unlimited devices.

data.name: PremiumInfoMapDesc
data.value: This overlay is larger than the free cloud sync limit. Supporters get 10x higher overlay sizes, more map markers and more screenshots.

data.name: CloudSyncDesc
data.value: Live upload and synchronize smart devices and map overlays securely in the cloud.

data.name: SupporterDescription
data.value: These features are exclusively available to our Supporters and Developers via Discord login.

data.name: CloudTooltipOverlayTooBigFormat
data.value: Overlay Size too big for sync ({0} KB)

data.name: ClearNotificationsConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to clear all notification history?

data.name: ServerNotFoundMessage
data.value: Could not find a paired server profile for {0}:{1}. Please pair this server first.

data.name: UiPlaysTheAlarmSoundUseTheButtonToChooseACustomSound
data.value: — plays the alarm sound. Use the … button to choose a custom sound.

data.name: UiShowsTheRedAlarmCardInsideTheApp
data.value: — shows the red alarm card inside the app.

data.name: UiAddATargetToSeeRaidCosts
data.value: Add a target to see raid costs.

data.name: UiBrowseOnlinePlayersAndTrackedTargets
data.value: Browse online players and tracked targets.

data.name: UiCachesMapRenderingOnTheGPUExtremelyImprovesPanningAndZoomingSmoothness
data.value: Caches map rendering on the GPU. Extremely improves panning and zooming smoothness.

data.name: UiCalculateComponentYieldsForWildAndSafeZoneRecyclers
data.value: Calculate component yields for wild and safe-zone recyclers.

data.name: UiCalculateRaidCostsAndRequiredMaterials
data.value: Calculate raid costs and required materials.

data.name: UiChooseATargetFromTheCatalogue
data.value: Choose a target from the catalogue.

data.name: UiCloudDiscordAlexaChatAndSteam
data.value: Cloud, Discord, Alexa, chat, and Steam

data.name: UiControlYourRustSmartSwitchesWithAmazonAlexaVoiceCommandsAn5B51481980
data.value: Control your Rust Smart Switches with Amazon Alexa voice commands and trigger Alexa routines when your Smart Alarms go off.

data.name: UiControlsMapImageScalingFilteringMode
data.value: Controls map image scaling filtering mode.

data.name: UiDeadPlayersCountAsOfflineOfflineConditionsIgnoreTheRadius
data.value: Dead players count as offline. Offline conditions ignore the radius.

data.name: UiDisablesAntiAliasingOnGridLinesAndMarkersImprovesRenderingC0D2589FE1
data.value: Disables anti-aliasing on grid lines and markers. Improves rendering speed on low-end systems.

data.name: UiFindWhereToBuyAnItem
data.value: Find where to buy an item

data.name: UiGenerateThe3DMapBeforeUsingHeatmaps
data.value: Generate the 3D map before using heatmaps.

data.name: UiGenerateThe3DMapToEnableNoBuildZones
data.value: Generate the 3D map to enable no-build zones.

data.name: UiGunpowderExplosivesTimingAndCookedOreConversionsAreShownOnF8080FA30D
data.value: Gunpowder, explosives, timing, and cooked/ore conversions are shown only when supplied by the dataset. Current data is already expanded to raw ingredients.

data.name: UiLeaveEmptyToAllowEveryoneOnTheServer
data.value: Leave empty to allow everyone on the server.

data.name: UiListenForRustPairingRequestsRightClickForRecoveryOptions
data.value: Listen for Rust+ pairing requests. Right-click for recovery options.

data.name: UiLogInToYourRustDeskAccountToGenerate3DMapsAndHeatmaps
data.value: Log in to your Rust+ Desk account to generate 3D maps and heatmaps.

data.name: UiMonitorAndControlPairedSmartDevices
data.value: Monitor and control paired smart devices.

data.name: UiOfflineCloudAlertsDiscordWebhookTelegramCalls
data.value: Offline Cloud Alerts | Discord, Webhook & Telegram Calls

data.name: UiPressESCToCancelEnterToSave
data.value: Press ESC to cancel, Enter to save

data.name: UiRaidItemsAndRawCraftingIngredients
data.value: Raid items and raw crafting ingredients

data.name: UiReadAlertsAloudViaDiscordTTS
data.value: Read alerts aloud via Discord TTS

data.name: UiResolutionScaleOfTheCachedGPUBitmapLowerScalesImprovePerfo767E03E084
data.value: Resolution scale of the cached GPU bitmap. Lower scales improve performance on slower GPUs.

data.name: UiReviewAlertsAndRecentServerEvents
data.value: Review alerts and recent server events.

data.name: UiRunThisRuleAgainAfterItCompletesAPositiveWaitStepIsRequired
data.value: Run this rule again after it completes. A positive Wait step is required.

data.name: UiRustSometimesSendsARaidNotificationWithoutTheSmartAlarmSDe9FA25CBAC2
data.value: Rust sometimes sends a raid notification without the Smart Alarm's device ID. RustPlusDesk cannot tell which alarm triggered it, so the shared settings below are used instead of a device's own settings.

data.name: UiSaveAndCloseChatCommandSettings
data.value: Save and close chat command settings

data.name: UiScrollToZoomDragToPanClickOrESCToCloseDoubleClickToReset
data.value: Scroll to Zoom • Drag to Pan • Click or ESC to Close • Double-Click to Reset

data.name: UiSearchDevicesByNameTypeOwnerID
data.value: Search devices by name, type, owner, ID...

data.name: UiSelectALayerToViewSpawnDensity
data.value: Select a layer to view spawn density

data.name: UiSelectMultipleRaidItemsForTheSmartCombinationSearch
data.value: Select multiple raid items for the smart combination search

data.name: UiSelectServerToSyncWithAlexa
data.value: Select Server to Sync with Alexa

data.name: UiSelectTheSourceRuleForThisTrigger
data.value: Select the source rule for this trigger.

data.name: UiSendCurrentMapViewToDiscordChannel
data.value: Send current map view to Discord channel

data.name: UiSettingsAreGroupedByWhatTheyControl
data.value: Settings are grouped by what they control.

data.name: UiShowDamageOverkillAndIngredientBreakdowns
data.value: Show damage, overkill, and ingredient breakdowns

data.name: UiSmartHomeWebhookURLEGIFTTTAlexaGoogle
data.value: Smart Home Webhook URL (e.g. IFTTT, Alexa, Google)

data.name: UiSomeSelectedMethodsHaveNoCraftingCostInTheDatasetTheirReso6911DDF87D
data.value: Some selected methods have no crafting cost in the dataset; their resources are excluded.

data.name: UiSyncYourRustConnectionToTheCloudToReceiveSmartRaidEventAleFE6557D858
data.value: Sync your Rust+ Connection to the cloud to receive smart Raid/Event alerts on Discord, Alexa, and Google Home even when your Desktop App is closed.

data.name: UiSyncBackupsTeamFeaturesAndSupporterAccessThisAccountIsSepa3DCE58FDD1
data.value: Sync, backups, team features, and supporter access. This account is separate from Rust+ Companion pairing and FCM.

data.name: UiTheCloudWorkerListensForIncomingAlarms
data.value: The cloud worker listens for incoming alarms.

data.name: UiThisConnectionIsForTheRustCompanionAPIItEnablesFCMPairingIE31DB5764D
data.value: This connection is for the Rust companion API. It enables FCM pairing, in-game broadcasts, alarms, and team chat. Your Cloud account is separate.

data.name: UiUsesYourRustSteamLoginInTheBrowserCloudSignInIsNotRequired
data.value: Uses your Rust+ / Steam login in the browser. Cloud sign-in is not required.

data.name: UiViewAndControlPairedCCTVCameras
data.value: View and control paired CCTV cameras.

data.name: UiWeCanAutomaticallyLocateTheMapInYourSteamInstallationFoldeEBF810A65E
data.value: We can automatically locate the map in your Steam installation folder, extract it, and build a 3D map with heat maps and richer monument overlays. No data will be altered, and no unrelated Steam folder data will be accessed.

data.name: UiYouCanRevokeThisAccessAtAnyTime
data.value: You can revoke this access at any time.

data.name: UiYourFCMConnectionTokenIsUploadedSecurely
data.value: Your FCM connection token is uploaded securely.

data.name: CodeUiAddAnEmailAndPasswordToThisAccount
data.value: Add an email and password to this account

data.name: CodeUiAdminAccessRequiresDiscordAuthAndADeveloperLeadContributorRole
data.value: Admin access requires Discord auth and a developer/lead contributor role.

data.name: CodeUiAreYouSureYouWantToClearTheOfflineDeathLog
data.value: Are you sure you want to clear the offline death log?

data.name: CodeUiCached3DMapDataDeletedItWillBeRebuiltWhenYouOpenA3DMapAgain
data.value: Cached 3D map data deleted. It will be rebuilt when you open a 3D map again.

data.name: CodeUiClearEveryTargetFromThisRaidPlan
data.value: Clear every target from this raid plan?

data.name: CodeUiCloudAccessHasBeenRevokedAndYourCredentialsHaveBeenDelD83B833612
data.value: Cloud access has been revoked and your credentials have been deleted from the cloud.

data.name: CodeUiCouldNotRetrieveDetailsFromTheRustConnectionMakeSureYo3487F38811
data.value: Could not retrieve details from the Rust+ connection. Make sure you are connected to the server.

data.name: CodeUiDiscordServerUnlinkedSuccessfullyTheBotWillNoLongerInt3E4A80E18E
data.value: Discord Server unlinked successfully. The bot will no longer interact with your server.

data.name: CodeUiFailedToSyncFCMConnectionEnsureYouAreLoggedInHaveAnActD817FA1B12
data.value: Failed to sync FCM connection. Ensure you are logged in, have an active Premium/Supporter tier, and your connection in Rust+ Companion is active.

data.name: CodeUiFailedToSyncFCMConnectionPleaseEnsureYouAreLoggedIn
data.value: Failed to sync FCM connection. Please ensure you are logged in.

data.name: CodeUiMaximumOf5ActiveTeammateSubscriptionsReachedPleaseUnsu9A1502FD52
data.value: Maximum of 5 active teammate subscriptions reached. Please unsubscribe from someone else first.

data.name: CodeUiNoActiveConnectionToRetrieveServerInfo
data.value: No active connection to retrieve server info.

data.name: CodeUiNoDeviceExportsFoundForYourTeamServer
data.value: No device exports found for your team / server.

data.name: CodeUiNotSignedInSyncAndBackupsUnavailable
data.value: Not signed in · sync and backups unavailable

data.name: CodeUiOnlyManuallyParsedOfflineMapsCanBeCopiedToOtherServers
data.value: Only manually parsed offline maps can be copied to other servers.

data.name: CodeUiPleaseConfigureADiscordChatAlertsOrEventsAlertsChannel83A26C087C
data.value: Please configure a Discord 'Chat Alerts' or 'Events Alerts' channel in Settings first.

data.name: CodeUiPleaseConnectYourCloudAccountFirst
data.value: Please connect your Cloud Account first.

data.name: CodeUiPleaseEnableCloudSyncFirstBeforeGeneratingAnAlexaPIN
data.value: Please enable Cloud Sync first before generating an Alexa PIN.

data.name: CodeUiPleaseEnterAValidTelegramUsername
data.value: Please enter a valid Telegram username.

data.name: CodeUiPleaseSaveADiscordServerIDFirst
data.value: Please save a Discord Server ID first.

data.name: CodeUiSteamIDNotFoundPleaseConnectToAServerFirst
data.value: Steam ID not found. Please connect to a server first.

data.name: CodeUiTheRustAPIDoesNotProvideADetailedDescriptionForThisServer
data.value: The Rust+ API does not provide a detailed description for this server.

data.name: CopyMapStagedMessage
data.value: Please select or connect to a paired server in the list. If its layout matches, the map will be copied automatically.

data.name: FormatFailedOpenPlayers
FormatOfflineMapNotParsed
data.value: The offline map '{0}' has not been parsed yet. Open its 3D map once to parse it, then try copying again.

data.name: FormatMapMismatch
data.value: Map layouts do not match. The map '{0}' does not appear to be the same map as the connected server '{1}'.

data.name: FormatMapCopied
data.value: Successfully copied the 3D map and local assets from '{0}' to '{1}'!

data.name: FormatMapCopyError
data.value: An error occurred while copying the map: {0}

data.name: FormatCloudLimits
FormatServerDescriptionWebsite
FormatUpdateSuccessful
data.value: Rust+ Desktop was successfully updated to v{0}!

data.name: UpdateInstallsOnClose
data.value: The update will be installed automatically when you close the app.

data.name: UpdateAlreadyDownloaded
data.value: The update is already downloaded. It will be installed when you close the app.

data.name: CloudFeaturesUpdateRequired
data.value: To continue using cloud features, you must update the application.

data.name: HowToTrackWindowTitle
data.value: How to Track Players — Rust+ Desk

data.name: DiscordClientInitializing
data.value: The desktop client is initializing or not fully loaded.

data.name: DiscordInvalidCommandPayload
data.value: ❌ Invalid command: the device name or ID is missing.

data.name: DiscordRenderingMap
data.value: ⌛ The map is being rendered. Please wait.

data.name: DiscordRenderingFullMap
data.value: ⌛ The full map is being rendered. Please wait.

data.name: Existing3DMapReused
data.value: Existing 3D map data was reused; no wipe was detected.

data.name: AutoDiscoveringQueryPort
data.value: Finding the query port through the Steam API...

data.name: PurgeOrphanedCloudDataTooltip
data.value: Scans Supabase database and removes devices, overlays, and markers from deleted servers.

data.name: PurgeOrphanedCloudDataConfirmMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to scan Supabase and permanently delete all cloud devices, map overlays, and base markers belonging to servers no longer in your server list?

data.name: PurgeOrphanedCloudDataSuccessMessage
UiDiscordWebhookExclusiveTooltip
data.value: If enabled, alert notifications are sent directly to Discord without posting them to Rust In-Game Team Chat. Ideal for solo servers or servers without team chat.
